title: Multivariable Calculus and Fields · Decision Notebook: Partial Derivatives
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving temperature and transport fields. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv partial derivatives increment in a reproducible multivariable calculus computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate partial derivatives in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Communicate physical accumulation in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Partial Derivatives evidence
steps.instruction: A model passes through (2, 8) and (6, 20). Calculate its average rate of change.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Use Δoutput/Δinput = (20 − 8) / (6 − 2).
